h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, left-aligned with significant top margin. Used for chapter or major section titles.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, bold, serif font, left-aligned. Used for sub-headings within a section.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Footnote reference marker within body text.
Separator line indicating the start of the footnote section.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX-style display math for centered equations; inline LaTeX for mathematical variables and symbols (e.g., $L$, $q$, $\dot{q}$).
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numerical citations in square brackets and superscript footnote markers.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footnote content located at the bottom of the page, separated from the main body by a thin horizontal line.
